title: Consistency checks
description: Automated checks for common issues in your dossier

summary.allPassedBody: No issues found in your dossier. Remember to verify all information is accurate before your appointment.
summary.disclaimer: These checks are organizational aids, not official requirements. Always verify requirements with the official embassy or visa center.

noAccommodation.title: No accommodation reservations
noAccommodation.description: No accommodation reservations have been added to the trip.
noAccommodation.action: Add accommodation reservations covering all nights of your trip.

accommodationGap.title: Accommodation does not cover entire trip
accommodationGap.description: The following nights are not covered by accommodation: {{dates}}
accommodationGap.action: Add accommodation reservations to cover all nights of your trip.

accommodationNameMismatch.title: Accommodation guest name may not match
accommodationNameMismatch.description: Guest name "{{guestName}}" on {{reservationName}} does not clearly match applicant name "{{applicantName}}".
accommodationNameMismatch.action: Verify the guest name matches the applicant's passport name.

requiredDocSkipped.title: Required document marked as not applicable
requiredDocSkipped.description: "{{document}}" is marked as required but set to "not applicable" without an explanation.
requiredDocSkipped.action: Add a note explaining why this required document does not apply.

docExpiresBeforeAppointment.title: Document expires before appointment
docExpiresBeforeAppointment.description: "{{document}}" expires on {{validUntil}}, before your appointment on {{appointmentDate}}.
docExpiresBeforeAppointment.action: Obtain an updated version of this document or mark it as needing an update.

missingRequiredDocs.title: Required documents not started
missingRequiredDocs.description_one: {{count}} required document has not been started: {{documents}}
missingRequiredDocs.description_other: {{count}} required documents have not been started: {{documents}}

docsNeedUpdate.title: Documents need updating
docsNeedUpdate.action: Obtain updated versions of these documents.

noApprovedLeave.title: No approved leave dates
noApprovedLeave.description: Employed applicants typically need to show approved leave from their employer.
noApprovedLeave.action: Enter your approved leave dates from your employer.

leaveStartsLate.title: Approved leave starts after trip begins
leaveStartsLate.description: Approved leave starts on {{leaveStart}}, but the trip starts on {{tripStart}}.
leaveStartsLate.action: Ensure your approved leave covers your entire trip.

leaveEndsEarly.title: Approved leave ends before trip ends
leaveEndsEarly.description: Approved leave ends on {{leaveEnd}}, but the trip ends on {{tripEnd}}.
leaveEndsEarly.action: Ensure your approved leave extends to cover your return.

noInsurance.title: No travel insurance
noInsurance.description: Travel medical insurance is required for Schengen visa applications.
noInsurance.action: Purchase travel medical insurance covering your entire trip.

insuranceDatesMissing.title: Insurance dates missing
insuranceDatesMissing.description: Insurance coverage start and end dates are required.

insuranceStartsLate.title: Insurance starts after trip begins
insuranceStartsLate.description: Insurance coverage starts on {{coverageStart}}, but the trip starts on {{tripStart}}.
insuranceStartsLate.action: Ensure insurance coverage starts on or before your trip start date.

insuranceEndsEarly.title: Insurance ends before trip ends
insuranceEndsEarly.description: Insurance coverage ends on {{coverageEnd}}, but the trip ends on {{tripEnd}}.
insuranceEndsEarly.action: Ensure insurance coverage extends to or beyond your trip end date.

insuranceCoverageLow.title: Insurance coverage may be insufficient
insuranceCoverageLow.description: Insurance coverage of {{amount}} may be below the Schengen minimum of {{minimum}}.
insuranceCoverageLow.action: Verify your insurance meets the minimum coverage requirement.

passportValidityInsufficient.title: Passport validity insufficient
passportValidityInsufficient.description: Passport expires on {{expiryDate}}, but must be valid for at least 3 months after the trip ends ({{tripEnd}}).
passportValidityInsufficient.action: Renew your passport before applying for the visa.

passportBlankPages.title: Blank passport pages required
passportBlankPages.description: Most visa applications require at least 2 blank pages in your passport.
passportBlankPages.action: Ensure your passport has at least 2 blank visa pages.

sponsorNoDocuments.title: Sponsor has no documents linked
sponsorNoDocuments.description: Sponsor "{{sponsorName}}" has financial information but no supporting documents linked.
sponsorNoDocuments.action: Add supporting financial documents for this sponsor.

sponsoredNoSponsor.title: Sponsor required for sponsored funding
sponsoredNoSponsor.description: Trip financing indicates sponsor funding, but no sponsors have been added.
sponsoredNoSponsor.action: Add at least one sponsor with their financial information.

sponsorsNoFinanceInfo.title: Sponsors have no financial information
sponsorsNoFinanceInfo.description: Sponsors have been added but none have financial information entered.
sponsorsNoFinanceInfo.action: Enter financial information for at least one sponsor.

sponsorRelationshipProof.title: Family sponsor may need relationship proof
sponsorRelationshipProof.description: Sponsor "{{sponsorName}}" ({{relationship}}) may require proof of family relationship.
sponsorRelationshipProof.action: Consider adding documents proving the family relationship.

tripDatesInvalid.title: Invalid trip dates
tripDatesInvalid.description: Trip entry date ({{entryDate}}) must be before the exit date ({{exitDate}}).
tripDatesInvalid.action: Correct the trip dates so entry comes before exit.

appointmentAfterTrip.title: Appointment after trip start
appointmentAfterTrip.description: Visa appointment ({{appointmentDate}}) must be before the trip entry date ({{entryDate}}).
appointmentAfterTrip.action: Schedule the visa appointment before your planned trip start date.

tripInPast.title: Trip date is in the past
tripInPast.description: Trip entry date ({{entryDate}}) is in the past.
tripInPast.action: Update the trip dates to a future date.

routeNightsMismatch.title: Route nights do not match trip duration
routeNightsMismatch.description: Route total ({{routeNights}} nights) does not match trip duration ({{totalNights}} nights).
routeNightsMismatch.action: Adjust route stop durations to match the total trip length.

mainDestinationMismatch.title: Main destination may be incorrect
mainDestinationMismatch.description: Declared main destination ({{declared}}) differs from the longest stay country ({{longest}} with {{nights}} nights).
mainDestinationMismatch.action: Verify that the main destination is the country where you will spend the most time.

firstEntryTransportMismatch.title: First entry country may not match transport
firstEntryTransportMismatch.description: Declared first entry country ({{declared}}) does not match the first transport arrival ({{actual}}).
firstEntryTransportMismatch.action: Verify the first entry country matches your transport reservations.
